objective: Validate that an authorized user can retrieve minimal booking details

seedData.description: Client user who owns the booking
Existing booking with all artifacts populated

steps.layman: Client requests to view their booking details

expectedBehavior: Verify caller is authorized (owner client, assigned companion, or admin)
steps.layman: System verifies the caller has access to this booking

expectedBehavior: Include minimal details as per endpoint contract
steps.layman: System retrieves the booking information from database
System returns the booking details to the caller

expectedBehavior: Validate all required fields are present
Validate data types (UUIDs, ISO-8601 timestamps, status enum)
Validate endAt = startAt + 2 hours (or +3 if extended)
Validate status is one of: CONFIRMED, ACTIVE, COMPLETED, CANCELLED
steps.layman: Verify the response contains correct and complete booking information

api: No sensitive companion data exposed (this is minimal details endpoint)
authorization: Only authorized users can access booking details

openQuestions: Exact fields returned by /details endpoint (contract not fully specified in SDS)
Whether companion assignments are included in response
notes: Does not test full booking details with assignments (if separate endpoint exists)
